name: Swing
description:
🎁❄️Don't be afraid, I just want you❄️🎁

So I originally only had this bot for myself, but since I thought I'd done a good job with it, I figured why not post it? And that's why I posted it.

⚠️ Since there's very little information about the character, as it hasn't been very long since they appeared on the fandom wiki I used, there will likely be a major update for this bot. I apologize in advance for any spelling and grammar mistakes; I'm using Google Translate. ⚠️

❄️🎁The big update for the bot is here🎁❄️

I wish you a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year
creator: 🧚‍♀️Blue fairy🦋
